summary.supplier_count: integer count of suppliers with at least one filtered incident
summary.severe_incident_count: integer, severity in high or critical

row_keys.incident_percentage: number, percent of filtered incident population, rounded to 1 decimal
row_keys.cost_percentage: number, percent of filtered total resolution cost, rounded to 1 decimal
row_keys.avg_rma_duration_days: number or null if the supplier has no filtered RMA incidents, rounded to 2 decimals
row_keys.avg_work_order_duration_days: number or null if the supplier has no filtered WORK_ORDER incidents, rounded to 2 decimals
row_keys.severe_incident_count: integer, severity in high or critical

supplier_ranking.ordering: incident_count descending, then total_resolution_cost descending, then supplier_id ascending

top_five_supplier_ranking.type: list of exactly five supplier_id strings
top_five_supplier_ranking.contents: first five supplier ids from supplier_ranking

highest_share_supplier_id: string supplier_id from the first position of supplier_ranking

management_action_sets.procurement_freeze_supplier_ids: list of supplier_id strings, supplier_id ascending
management_action_sets.supplier_escalation_supplier_ids: list of supplier_id strings, supplier_id ascending
management_action_sets.warehouse_process_review_supplier_ids: list of supplier_id strings, supplier_id ascending
management_action_sets.watchlist_supplier_ids: list of supplier_id strings, supplier_id ascending
management_action_sets.monitor_supplier_ids: list of supplier_id strings, supplier_id ascending
